name: Guest Blogger Agreement & Release Form
description: Terms, conditions, and copyright release form for authors submitting guest posts to a blog or website.
content:
GUEST BLOGGER AGREEMENT AND PUBLICATION RELEASE

This Agreement outlines the terms and conditions between {{author_name}} ("Author") and {{blog_owner_name}} ("Blog Owner") regarding the submission and publication of a guest post on {{blog_name}} ({{blog_url}}).

1. AUTHOR DETAILS

Name: {{author_name}}
Email: {{author_email}}
{{#if author_website}}Website/Blog: {{author_website}}{{/if}}
{{#if author_social_media}}Social Media: {{author_social_media}}{{/if}}

2. PROPOSED POST DETAILS

Working Title: {{post_title}}
Summary/Topic: {{post_summary}}

3. PUBLICATION TERMS & WARRANTIES

The Author warrants and agrees to the following:

  • The submitted post is 100% original, has not been published elsewhere (in print or digitally), and does not infringe upon any third-party copyright, trademark, or intellectual property rights.
  • The post adheres to the Blog's quality standards and {{#if guidelines_link}}editorial guidelines{{else}}stated submission rules{{/if}}.
  • The Blog Owner reserves the right to edit the post for clarity, grammar, SEO, formatting, and title adjustments. Significant content changes will be discussed with the Author prior to publication.
  • The Blog Owner does not guarantee publication. The final decision to publish rests solely with the Blog Owner.
  • Once published, {{#if (eq can_author_remove 'Yes')}}the Author may request the removal of the post by providing reasonable written notice{{else}}the Author may not demand the removal of the post without the express consent of the Blog Owner{{/if}}.

4. COPYRIGHT & LICENSING

{{#if (eq copyright_status 'Transferred to Blog Owner')}}

The Author hereby permanently transfers and assigns all copyrights and proprietary rights of the submitted post to the Blog Owner. The Blog Owner may repurpose, modify, or distribute the content as they see fit without further compensation.

{{else}}

The Author retains the original copyright to the post. However, the Author grants the Blog Owner a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive license to publish the post on {{blog_url}} and to use the content for promotional purposes across the Blog's social media and newsletters. Additional Terms: {{license_scope}}

{{/if}}

5. AUTHOR CREDIT

The Author will receive proper attribution for the post. {{#if (eq include_author_bio 'Yes')}}An author bio box, including the bio below and provided links, will accompany the published post.{{/if}}

{{#if (eq include_author_bio 'Yes')}}

Author Bio:

{{author_bio}}
{{/if}}

By signing below, I acknowledge that I have read, understood, and agree to the terms of this Guest Blogger Agreement.

Date: {{formatDate agreement_date}}

Author Signature:

_________________________
{{author_name}}

fields.name: can_author_remove
fields.label: Can the author request post removal later?

fields.name: license_scope
fields.label: License Scope (If Retained by Author)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Granted perpetual license for the website only.
